sentences.english: I want to subscribe to your streaming service.
We have three plans — basic standard and premium.
sentences.korean: 세 가지 플랜이 있어요 — 기본 일반 프리미엄.

sentences.english: Basic is ad-supported at six dollars per month.
Standard is ad-free at twelve dollars and premium adds 4K streaming and four simultaneous screens for eighteen dollars.
sentences.korean: 일반은 광고 없이 12달러이고 프리미엄은 4K 스트리밍과 4개 동시 화면이 추가되어 18달러예요.

sentences.english: Can I try it before committing?
sentences.korean: 약정 전에 시험 사용해볼 수 있나요?

sentences.english: Yes we offer a seven-day free trial for all plans.
sentences.korean: 네 모든 플랜에 7일 무료 체험을 제공해요.

quiz.question: What does '무료 체험' mean in English?
